title: sambucus miquelii
intro: Sambucus miquelii, also known as the Chinese elder or Miquel's elder, is a species of flowering plant in the family Adoxaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, such as relieving cold and flu symptoms, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory issues. Sambucus miquelii can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
